Label: DisclosureOfNotesOnShareholdingPatternForCompanyRemarksExplanatoryTextBlock
Value: <div><div><span>The Company has allotted 45'|00'|000 equity shares and 93'|00'|000 Unlisted Convertible Warrants on preferential basis to Promoter and non-promoter public category investors through a circular resolution passed by the Board of Directors dated September 10'| 2024. The Company has received Listing approval for the said equity shares from BSE Limited vide their letter dated September 30'| 2024 and from NSE vide their letter dated October 03'| 2024. </span><span>Considering the allotment of said equity shares on or before 30.09.2024'| for the sake of clarity in the holding of shares as on 30.09.2024 the same has been reflected in the shareholding pattern for the quarter ending September 30'| 2024.  </span></div></div>
Description: Disclosure of notes on shareholding pattern for company remarks explanatory
